name: Bedtime:turn off the life
short_description: This is a third-person horror game combining 8 Ban, rule-based ghost stories, and children's themes. It is said breaking the seventh-day taboos lets you see ghosts. To see the departed, you believe the rumor. As time passes, the house in your memory grows eerier... Is there a... head here? Right?
detailed_description:
Breaking the Taboos of the Seventh Day

Extinguish the eternal light, insert incense upside down, and turn back during the summoning. Following these taboos lets the deceased rest, but breaking them might let you see ghosts.

Childhood Games, But Played with Ghosts

Play hide and seek, red light green light, and musical chairs with ghosts. There's always someone to play with, but the cost of losing is death.

Lingering Fear with 8 Ban Style Gameplay

It's not about comparing sizes or counting differences. Each ghost is obvious, and the more you think, the scarier it gets.

Childhood Items, Right?

Small game consoles, elementary school textbooks, palm fans. They're from your childhood, but something's off.

No Jump Scares

The creator is also scared, so there are no jump scares. But that doesn't mean it's not scary!

Karma

Good deeds bring good results, and bad deeds bring bad results. If you provoke our ghosts, make sure to exorcise them thoroughly!

Discord：hAd8M6h2
